challenges.title: shoppinghaul
challenges.desc: Whether you're balling on a budget or love the finer things in life, show us your latest #ShoppingHaul.

stickerText: This is by far one of the most stylish bags I’ve gotten. It’s so cool and recognizable right away. The black material feels soft and gets that nice slouchy look. It’s lightweight and very roomy, which makes it great for everyday when you need to carry a lot. The chain straps have a nice weight and can be worn on the shoulder or carried by hand. It’s one of those bags that makes a simple outfit look more stylish.🖤

Love the relaxed look. The suede is soft, feels high end, and the weave is beautifully done. The color is rich and goes with anything. The craftsmanship looks clean. It’s spacious, the shoulder shape sits comfortably under the arm, and overall it has that elegant, minimalist feel.🤎

It’s so minimalist and beautiful. The leather feels soft and high quality, and the shape is so elegant. It has that quiet luxury style that makes it feel special. The size is great for everyday since it holds a lot like a wallet, phone, notebook, mini laptop and other essentials. The stitching and details look very clean, and the structure helps it keep its shape nicely.🖤

contents.desc: Minimalist bag haul you actually need🥹🎀
